name: ios-design
description: iOS and Swift workflows for SwiftUI implementation, refactoring, performance audits, Liquid Glass adoption, and simulator debugging.

interface.shortDescription: SwiftUI and iOS workflows for UI work, refactors, performance, and debugging
interface.longDescription: iOS and Swift workflows for building or refactoring SwiftUI UI, adopting Liquid Glass patterns, auditing runtime performance, and debugging apps on simulators with XcodeBuildMCP-backed workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use iOS Design to build or refactor SwiftUI UI, audit performance, adopt Liquid Glass APIs, or debug an iOS app on a simulator.
